script.name: !ship.cmd.drone.supply
script.sourceplaintext:
[THIS] ->set command: COMMAND_DRONE_SUPPLYSHIPS
$dronesSaved = null $waresReserved = [THIS] ->get resupply table $wares = table alloc $dronesTasked = table alloc $dronesAssignedShip = table alloc $suppliesAssigned = table alloc
while [TRUE] $aDrones = [THIS] ->get managed ships: role=Drone $i = size of array $aDrones if not $i gosub sub.Loop continue end gosub sub.GetIdleDrones $i = size of array $dronesIdle if not $i gosub sub.Loop continue end if not $dronesSaved == $dronesIdle @ $droneExamples = [THIS] -> call script !lib.get.examples.from.objects : =$dronesIdle $dronesSaved = $dronesIdle end $aShips = [SECTOR] -> get ship array from sector/ship/station $s = size of array $aShips while $i if not size of table $wares gosub sub.GetShipToSupply if not size of table $wares gosub sub.Loop break end end dec $i = $drone = $dronesIdle[$i] $suppliesLoaded = table alloc
* Unload any wares left in drone $tWares = $drone ->get wares table: include equipped=[FALSE] if $tWares $ware = get next key: table=$tWares key=null while $ware $amt = $tWares[$ware] = $drone -> unload $amt units of $ware $ware = get next key: table=$tWares key=$ware end end
* Load supplies into drone $keysToRemove = array alloc: size=0 $ware = get next key: table=$wares key=null while $ware * = wait randomly from 10 to 40 ms $amt = $wares[$ware] $loaded = $drone ->load $amt units of $ware, ignore minimum=[TRUE] if $loaded $suppliesLoaded[$ware] = $loaded if $amt == $loaded append $ware to array $keysToRemove else $remaining = $amt - $loaded $wares[$ware] = $remaining end end $ware = get next key: table=$wares key=$ware end remove key $keysToRemove from table $wares
* Dispatch drone if size of table $suppliesLoaded @ START $drone -> call script !move.drone.resupply : Ware Table=$suppliesLoaded Target=$ship $dronesAssignedShip[$drone] = $ship $dronesTasked[$drone] = $suppliesLoaded end end
gosub sub.Loop end return null
* ================================================== * Cycle through ships in sector to find one to resupply * ============================== sub.GetShipToSupply: while $s dec $s = $ship = $aShips[$s] $ship.owner = $ship -> get true owner skip if [OWNER] == $ship.owner continue do if $ship == [THIS] continue skip if $ship -> exists break do if $dronesTasked[$ship] continue
$tResupply = $ship ->get resupply table skip if $tResupply continue $volumeFree = $ship -> get free volume of cargo bay skip if $volumeFree continue
* Check for drones currently transporting supplies to this ship clear table $suppliesAssigned $keysToRemove = array alloc: size=0 $drone = get next key: table=$dronesAssignedShip key=null while $drone * $dronesAssignedShip $shipAssigned = $dronesAssignedShip[$drone] if $ship == $shipAssigned if not $drone -> exists append $drone to array $keysToRemove else if $drone -> is script !move.drone.resupply on stack of task=0 $suppliesAssigned2 = $dronesTasked[$drone] $suppliesAssigned = merge tables, $suppliesAssigned, $suppliesAssigned2, null, null, null else append $drone to array $keysToRemove end end $drone = get next key: table=$dronesAssignedShip key=$drone end remove key $keysToRemove from table $dronesAssignedShip remove key $keysToRemove from table $dronesTasked
clear table $wares $ware = get next key: table=$tResupply key=null while $ware * Check target ship can hold requested ware. if not $ship -> can transport ware $ware $ware = get next key: table=$tResupply key=$ware continue end * Check we have any drone that can transport the ware $canTransport = [FALSE] $j = size of array $droneExamples while $j dec $j = $drone = $droneExamples[$j] if $drone -> can transport ware $ware $canTransport = [TRUE] break end end if not $canTransport $ware = get next key: table=$tResupply key=$ware continue end * Check if target ship already contains some of the supply ware. $amt = $tResupply[$ware] $amtShip = $ship -> get true amount of ware $ware in cargo bay $amt = $amt - $amtShip * Check for any supplies already enroute to target ship. $amtAssigned = $suppliesAssigned[$ware] do if $amtAssigned $amt = $amt - $amtAssigned if $amt <= 0 $ware = get next key: table=$tResupply key=$ware continue end
* Check how much of this ware is contained in carrier excluding amount reserved in its own supply table $amtThis = [THIS] -> get true amount of ware $ware in cargo bay $amtReserved = $waresReserved[$ware] do if $amtReserved $amtThis = $amtThis - $amtReserved if not $amtThis $ware = get next key: table=$tResupply key=$ware continue end do if $amtThis < $amt $amt = $amtThis
* Check target ship has cargo space free for the ware $volumeWare = get volume of ware $ware if $volumeFree < $volumeWare $ware = get next key: table=$tResupply key=$ware continue end $amtFree = $volumeFree / $volumeWare do if $amtFree < $amt $amt = $amtFree $volumeFree = $volumeFree - ( $amt * $volumeWare ) $wares[$ware] = $amt skip if $volumeFree break $ware = get next key: table=$tResupply key=$ware end do if size of table $wares break end endsub
* ========================= * Filter idle docked drones to resupply with * ========================= sub.GetIdleDrones: $dronesIdle = array alloc: size=0 while $i dec $i = $drone = $aDrones[$i] @ do if [THIS] -> call script !lib.carrier.isshipbusy : Ship=$drone Allow Recall=[FALSE] continue $env = $drone -> get environment skip if $env == [THIS] continue append $drone to array $dronesIdle if $dronesTasked[$drone] remove key $drone from table $dronesTasked remove key $drone from table $dronesAssignedShip end end endsub
* ========================== * Recall drones and move around for a bit * ========================== sub.Loop: @ = [THIS] -> call script !lib.carrier.recallidle : @ = [THIS] -> move around 30000 ms @ = wait 100 ms @ = [THIS] -> call script !lib.carrier.recallidle : endsub
return null

comment.var: Unload any wares left in drone
Cycle through ships in sector to find one to resupply

line.text: get free volume of cargo bay

comment.var: Check for drones currently transporting supplies to this ship
Check target ship can hold requested ware.
Check we have any drone that can transport the ware
Check if target ship already contains some of the supply ware.
Check for any supplies already enroute to target ship.
Check how much of this ware is contained in carrier excluding amount reserved in its own supply table
Check target ship has cargo space free for the ware
Filter idle docked drones to resupply with
Recall drones and move around for a bit

sval.val: Unload any wares left in drone
Cycle through ships in sector to find one to resupply
Check for drones currently transporting supplies to this ship
Check target ship can hold requested ware.
Check we have any drone that can transport the ware
Check if target ship already contains some of the supply ware.
Check for any supplies already enroute to target ship.
Check how much of this ware is contained in carrier excluding amount reserved in its own supply table
Check target ship has cargo space free for the ware
Filter idle docked drones to resupply with
Recall drones and move around for a bit
